nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, representing {{tenantName}}.

I saw you were interested in candles/crafts. A quick piece of insight: most big-box candles use paraffin wax and synthetic fragrances that actually pollute indoor air. Artisan soy or beeswax with essential oils burns cleaner and lasts twice as long.

Quality materials really do make a difference!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hi {{name}},

Quick thought — {{tenantName}} recently poured a custom batch for a client creating corporate gifts.

They wanted something that didn't feel cheap. The feedback they got from their partners was incredible because the scent throw filled the room without giving anyone a headache.

Hand-poured makes all the difference.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hi {{name}},

I want to properly introduce {{tenantName}}.

They have spent {{years}} mastering {{profession}}. Their proudest recent launch: {{biggestWin}}. What makes our studio different: {{differentiator}}.

We don't manufacture; we hand-craft for {{icp}}.

If you appreciate real craftsmanship, you'll love our studio.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — did you find the gifts/products you were looking for?

{{tenantName}} asked me to follow up. We love connecting with people who appreciate artisan goods.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question.

On a scale of 1-10, how ready are you to place an order or coordinate a custom batch? (1 = Just browsing the aesthetic, 10 = I want to buy right now).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Got it, totally fair.

What's keeping you from being a 10? Are you looking for a specific scent we don't carry, comparing prices, or just not needing it right this moment?

Let me know so I don't send you irrelevant info.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
I see — {{answer}}.

Actually, a lot of our first-time buyers have that exact thought. {{tenantName}} specifically designed our collections to address that, which led to {{biggestWin}}.

Does knowing we have a curated solution for that change your readiness (1-10)?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

I'll be direct — {{tenantName}} pours in small batches so quality stays high. Our next pour is almost fully allocated.

If you want in on this batch, let me know. If you're just window shopping, I completely respect that and will let you browse in peace!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hi {{name}},

Before I stop following up, consider this.

Your environment dictates your mood. A cheap candle smells like a cheap candle. A beautifully crafted scent elevates an entire room.

If you're ready to actually elevate your space, simply reply "Let's ship it."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

This is my final message. I'm taking you off our active outreach list.

{{tenantName}} is back in the studio pouring! If you ever need artisan goods, our site is always open.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:
Hi {{name}},

Checking in — just passing along some studio news.

We just dropped a new collection focused on {{differentiator}}. 

Hope your space is smelling amazing!

— {{botName}}
